model.ambient_execution_rule: execute the same color pair and seed in the full two-layer chain
model.ambient_rule: serial composition of outer and inner chains
model.certified_move_rule: single outer-chain Kempe component disjoint from both the outer input stubs and shared output interface
model.inner_layer: one downstream tau/mirror chain sharing the outer layer output interface
model.outer_layer: tau/mirror chain used as the collar under test

source: Section 9.2 Step 4 two-layer full-interface ambient execution probe
